info.title: Dozuki API v2.0 Manufactured OpenAPI
info.summary: Dozuki API v2.0 exposes work-instruction, training, approval, user, team, skills, signoff, and work-log resources used to manage digital manufacturing documentation and operator workflows.
info.description: Manufactured OpenAPI artifact for Dozuki API v2.0. This file was synthesized by Last Mile from curated research JSON and is not vendor-certified. Use it as an agent-consumable starting point, then validate paths, schemas, authentication, and server URLs with the vendor before production use. Dozuki's public API v2.0 docs describe a JSON-first REST surface for guides, wikis, courses, users, teams, approvals, periodic review, quizzes, skills, step forms, webhooks, and work-log execution. The documentation explicitly supports GET, POST, PATCH, PUT, and DELETE across guide, course, team, and work-log resources, including guide-step editing, course assignment, signoff workflows, skills ratings, and execution-state updates for in-progress work. That makes the API useful for structured asset or procedure content and manufacturing workflow writeback, but not for telemetry streams. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

servers.description: Placeholder server template. Replace with the vendor-confirmed API host and base path before generating production clients.

externalDocs.description: Vendor documentation used as the primary public source for this manufactured contract.
